author: @cannabearr
text: Cool flat earth model :)

replies.author: @cannabearr
replies.text: @ThinkingandTinkering based on *ANGLE MEASUREMENTS* to the celestial (bodies). The horizon is not a sphere edge, boats don't go over the edge, no tangent. The "solar system" is a flat earth "model". The globe "model" is based on measuring angles from the horizontal reference plane we call sea *LEVEL* :). There are no men floating in a sky vacuum, they are hanging from strings like puppets, faking weightlessness using zero-g planes, cgi, greenscreen technology etc. If the sky was a vacuum, gas pressure would press into and fill the available volume. "Gravity is not a force", "There is NO force of gravity" according to modern physics. Level is horizontal, vertical is perpendicular to horizontal. Sorry if the truth sounds like bad news, but there is no need to believe in the "photoshopped because it has to be" planet earth. Love your work btw :)

author: @jamesross1003
text: That is such a thing of beauty for an old steam punk/clockwork nut like myself.  Thanks so much Robert!  It just begs to be put on the curio shelf and be played with regularly.  LOL!  You could make a short easy video about putting it in the current planet configuration as they would have done with the original.  Then again, I love this kind of thing and am being selfish in wanting to see more of it or similar mechanism. Thanks again Robert!  Stay curious and keep tinkering!

author: @totherarf
text:
Oh look ...... A Steam Punk  Antikythera!

It is truly amazing that what was once the peak achievement of a civilization requiring many months of work by the best artificers they had, is now something that you can easily knock together in a couple of days!
